tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 摽有梅，其實七兮，求我庶士，迨其吉兮。 摽有梅，其實三兮，求我庶士，迨其今兮。 摽有梅，頃筐塈之，求我庶士，迨其謂之。

1 Dropping are the fruits from the plum-tree; There are [but] seven [tenths] of them left ! For the gentlemen who seek me, This is the fortunate time !
2 Dropping are the fruits from the plum-tree ; There are [but] three [tenths] of them left ! For the gentlemen who seek me, Now is the time.
3 Dropt are the fruits from the plum-tree ; In my shallow basket I have collected tliem. AVould the gentlemen Avho seek me [Only] speak about it !
